problems.text: Let \(A \in \mathbb{C}^{m\times n}\) and \(B \in \mathbb{C}^{n\times p}\). Prove or provide a counterexample to the following statements. Justify each nontrivial step.

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: The Frobenius norm satisfies \(\lVert AB\rVert_F \leq \lVert A\rVert_F\lVert B\rVert_F\).

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text: \(\lVert A\rVert_2 \leq \lVert A\rVert_F\), where \(\lVert A\rVert_F\) is the Frobenius norm of \(A\).

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: Find an economy singular value decomposition of \(A\).

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text: Find an economy QR decomposition of \(B\).

problems.text: Let \(\lVert\cdot\rVert\) be a subordinate (induced) matrix norm.

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text:
If \(E\) is \(n\times n\) with \(\lVert E\rVert<1\), then show \(I+E\) is nonsingular and
\[
\lVert(I+E)^{-1}\rVert\leq \frac{1}{1-\lVert E\rVert}.
\]

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text:
If \(A\) is \(n\times n\) invertible and \(E\) is \(n\times n\) with \(\lVert A^{-1}\rVert\lVert E\rVert<1\), then show \(A+E\) is nonsingular and
\[
\lVert(A+E)^{-1}\rVert\leq \frac{\lVert A^{-1}\rVert}{1-\lVert A^{-1}\rVert\lVert E\rVert}.
\]

problems.text: Let \(P\in\mathbb{C}^{m\times m}\) be a projector. Show that \(\lVert P\rVert_2=1\) if and only if \(P\) is an orthogonal projector.

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: Prove that each principal submatrix of \(A\) is Hermitian positive definite.

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text: Prove that an element of \(A\) with largest magnitude lies on the diagonal.

subparts.label: (c)
subparts.text: Prove that \(A\) has a Cholesky decomposition.
